text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: (Huh? Is that the ceiling?)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Finally awake, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: McQueen? Are we in the infirmary?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I noticed you were particularly absorbed in your work as of late, but I
never thought you'd actually collapse.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Looks like the stress got to me more than I thought.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Let's be grateful that it was just fatigue. Now... care to tell me what
work was so important that you ended up collapsing?

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: I just... wanted to find a way to guarantee Suzuka's success.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Her success?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Correct me if I'm wrong, but the Suzuka I know is not cause for such
concern... Is that truly the reason?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Well, I do want to make sure she succeeds... But that's because I'm afraid of what happens if her body fails...

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: All right, all right. The truth is...

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: All right, all right. The truth is...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: The risk of Suzuka's running style...

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
She runs amazingly—like a dream! Even I get chills thinking about
what we'll see at her next race.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
But... what if that running is doing harm to her body? I'd hate to see
her future stolen from her by an accident.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
But... what if that running is doing harm to her body? I'd hate to see
her future stolen from her by an accident.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
But that's the worst-case scenario. You seem so certain that this will
happen.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
I'm not doing anything that would guarantee it, but... I can't find
anything that would prevent it either.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
I'm not doing anything that would guarantee it, but... I can't find
anything that would prevent it either.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Well then, why don't we start by taking a nice, deep breath?

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: McQueen...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Trainer... I don't think such an unlikely scenario is worth your concern.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Surely you've heard this before, no? We Umamusume run carrying the
hopes and dreams of others.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: Yeah, Agnes Tachyon mentioned the same thing when I talked to her.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
No matter how hard you work for your dreams, there comes a time
when you feel you cannot proceed any further. Sometimes it's a
physical problem, and sometimes psychological.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
"I can't go on." "This is the end." I can't tell you how often I've had
those thoughts... I'm sure my teammates have all felt the same.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
However, overcoming limitations is another part of being an
Umamusume. And by doing so, we challenge the notion that such
limitations existed in the first place.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
As long as we have the hopes and dreams of our supporters,
Umamusume are limitless.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
If you need proof, you needn't look any further than your own
journey.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: Wait, me?

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: Wait, me?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
When each of your trainees fell on hard times, who was it that picked
them up? As we took off towards our dreams, who pointed us towards
the finish line?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
If it weren't for you and the unconditional support you offered us,
none of us would be who we are today.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
In fact, I would say you've helped us achieve more than we could
have ever imagined.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
To think that you would dedicate everything, just for me... I am truly
grateful.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
But despite that, I will shoulder your hopes and keep running—as your
team's ace!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I... I want to win too!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
And I want to make them smile today. So I'm going to give this race
my all.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I wanna win! It's always been my dream! I'm scared, but I can't quit
now! URAAAAAGH!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Totally! And we'll run them all together! Let's go for it! To what's
beyond the Derby!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: With all this support, I refuse to yield. Victory is mine.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, but I'm not going to stop here. My urge to run is what I'll use to
propel me forward.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Even if your path with Suzuka does hit her limit, it will be all right. I'm
sure you'll find a way forward.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Of all the hopes and dreams propelling her forward, I'm sure yours are
some of the strongest.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even when the way forward was blocked, McQueen and the others all
managed to break through and make their dreams come true.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And that's because I was there to offer them a final push as they tore
down those barriers.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And that's because I was there to offer them a final push as they tore
down those barriers.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If that's the case, then I shouldn't be sitting around making Suzuka
anxious. Instead...
choice_data_list: I need to take in the scenery Suzuka shows me!
I need to take in the scenery Suzuka shows me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If that's the case, then I shouldn't be sitting around making Suzuka
anxious. Instead...
choice_data_list: I need to take in the scenery Suzuka shows me!
I need to take in the scenery Suzuka shows me!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
She should be running on the training track. I suggest you go give her
the same push you gave us.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Silence Suzuka believed in me enough to join our team. Since then,
we've been on this path together, racing towards the scenery of her
dreams.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Silence Suzuka believed in me enough to join our team. Since then,
we've been on this path together, racing towards the scenery of her
dreams.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But somewhere along the line, my eyes wandered... I started to worry
about her ability to run—about things that had not yet happened.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But somewhere along the line, my eyes wandered... I started to worry
about her ability to run—about things that had not yet happened.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: Suzuka!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Trainer?

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: Suzuka, I'm so sorry.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: Suzuka, I'm so sorry.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
I've been teaching you all about running techniques and different
training methods, but I forgot the most important lesson I can give
you.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
I've been teaching you all about running techniques and different
training methods, but I forgot the most important lesson I can give
you.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: And what would... that be?

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
Every time I watch you run, I can see you coming into your own as a
racer. And every time, my heart swells with anticipation.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
Every time I watch you run, I can see you coming into your own as a
racer. And every time, my heart swells with anticipation.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
But so do my fears. I worry that your body won't be able to handle the
strain.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
But so do my fears. I worry that your body won't be able to handle the
strain.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
And over time, I let those fears grow bigger and bigger, to the point
where I obsessed over a made-up scenario.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
And over time, I let those fears grow bigger and bigger, to the point
where I obsessed over a made-up scenario.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I see, so that's why you looked so anxious. You were concerned for
my well-being...

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, but now I realize that those worries are proof that I didn't trust
you enough. I didn't believe you could keep running.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, but now I realize that those worries are proof that I didn't trust
you enough. I didn't believe you could keep running.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
Suzuka... No matter how long or short our journey may be, I want to
be there for you. I want to see you catch up to that scenery you seek,
just like we promised!

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
Suzuka... No matter how long or short our journey may be, I want to
be there for you. I want to see you catch up to that scenery you seek,
just like we promised!

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
In order to make that happen, all I can do—and all I need to do—is
believe in you! So please...

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
In order to make that happen, all I can do—and all I need to do—is
believe in you! So please...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
All right, I won't let anything hold me back anymore. I'll leave all my
rivals behind and take hold of my dreams.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: And I know you'll be there, cheering me on.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With those simple words, the heavy cloud that was hanging over my
head dissipates, replaced by a giddy, slightly embarrassed smile.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
Could you make one more promise to me? After you leave the pack
behind and cross the finish line...
choice_data_list:
Just make sure... You'll always come back to
me.

Just make sure... You'll always come back to
me.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
Could you make one more promise to me? After you leave the pack
behind and cross the finish line...
choice_data_list:
Just make sure... You'll always come back to
me.

Just make sure... You'll always come back to
me.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Of course. How else will I return the hopes you entrusted me with?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I promise, I will always come back.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
We're leaving the final corner and heading into the homestretch! In
the lead is Silence Suzuka! But the other racers are in fast pursuit!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
From the outside comes Air Groove! Air Groove is closing the gap!
Closer, closer...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
But it's no use! It's Silence Suzuka! Silence Suzuka maintains her lead
with another burst of speed!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Silence Suzuka... is our winner! With that breakneck speed, she's
claimed the grand prix title!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Umamusume run carrying the hopes and dreams of others, including
mine...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I've never felt those words ring truer than at today's race.
